title: QuickSlots
description: Use hotbar items with custom keybinds, configurable delay, and settings.
body:
# QuickSlots

QuickSlots enhances your Minecraft gameplay by letting you instantly use items from your hotbar with custom keybinds! Press a key to activate a slot and simulate a right-click—perfect for quickly using a bow, eating food, or placing a block. After activation, the mod can return you to your original slot after a configurable delay, ensuring seamless inventory management.

## Features

- **Custom Keybinds**: Assign keys to each hotbar slot (1-9) to instantly use the item in that slot.
- **Right-Click Simulation**: Activates the item as if you right-clicked (e.g., shoot a bow, eat food, place a block).
- **Configurable Delay**: Set a delay (0 to 1 second) before returning to your original slot after activation.
- **Config Screen**: Customize settings via an in-game config screen, accessible with a keybind (default: `P`) or through ModMenu.
  - Toggle the mod on/off.
  - Enable/disable right-click simulation for empty slots.
  - Adjust the return delay.
- **Smart Slot Handling**: If you manually switch slots during the delay, the return is canceled, giving you full control.
- **Localization**: Supports English and Russian, with more languages easily added.

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.x-1.21.x
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric
- **Dependencies**:
  - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (v11.0.0 or higher)
  - [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional for config screen access)
- Works well with most other mods, as it only modifies hotbar interactions.

---

Happy slotting! 🚀
